overall.description: A cinematic third-person sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The scene begins with a static view of a street vendor corner, then transitions to following a pedestrian down a wet commercial sidewalk lined with holographic billboards and palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner vendor stall with neon signage

man sitting in white chair beside the vendor cart

entered.detail: metallic food cart with glowing neon accents and cooking equipment
large multicolored umbrella with red and green sections over the vendor
tall vertical digital billboard displaying red and white graphics on building facade
futuristic high-rise building with illuminated windows and geometric architecture
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting neon lights and street lamps

segments.scene_description: The camera observes a quiet street corner at night in a cyberpunk city. A vendor tends their cart under a colorful umbrella while a man sits nearby. Neon billboards illuminate the wet pavement as sparse traffic passes on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian walkway lined with digital billboards

events.description: camera begins walking forward to follow pedestrian in white shirt and red pants

agents.ego_description: walking down the wet sidewalk following a pedestrian through the neon-lit commercial district with holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white top and red pants walking ahead of camera down the sidewalk

entered.detail: large orange digital advertisement displaying ALL FOODS text with product imagery
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk median in planters
bright storefront with multiple illuminated vending machines and cyan neon trim
elevated walkway with glass sides connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a pedestrian down a wet commercial sidewalk lined with towering digital billboards and palm trees. The scene passes vending machine storefronts and construction barricades while other pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. The neon reflections shimmer on the rain-slicked pavement as the camera maintains a steady pace behind the target pedestrian.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at a quiet street corner and evolves into a steady glide through a bustling, neon-lit commercial district. It begins by observing a street vendor tending a cart under a colorful umbrella, with neon billboards casting vibrant light across the wet pavement and sparse traffic. As the camera shifts focus, it begins to follow a pedestrian moving away from the corner and down a rain-slicked sidewalk. The scene then expands into a dense corridor of towering digital billboards and palm trees, passing by vending machine storefronts and construction barricades. Finally, the camera maintains a steady pace behind the target, capturing the shimmering reflections of the city's lights on the ground as other pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction.
